case_title: JACKI J RUST VS. ALEXANDRIA ELIZABETH SMITH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUST, JACKI J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, ALEXANDRIA ELIZABETH $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,875.00, PLEASE SEE ENCLOSED MC-025 FORM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2022 - CONTINUED TO APR-06-2022 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,128.00 FILED BY RUST, JACKI J AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ALEXANDRIA ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY RUST, JACKI J SMITH, ALEXANDRIA ELIZABETH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT RUST, JACKI J TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT SMITH, ALEXANDRIA ELIZABETH MS. RUST WAS SENT NOTICES TO APPEAR FOR MARCH 10, 2022 + APRIL 6, 2022. SHE FAILED TO APPEAR ON BOTH DAYS. JUDGEMENT FOR MS. SMITH BY DEFAULT. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Alexandria Elizabeth Smith, represented by Counsel Katrina Decker Esq. (184161) the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Jacki J. Rust the opposing party is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Appellant, Defendant Alexandria Elizabeth Smithparties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Alexandria Elizabeth Smith testifies on her behalf.

Respondent, Plaintiff Jacki J. Rust is not present.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Sharon Reardon, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (625)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 624
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexandria Smith, Appellant/Defendant [by Zoom]. No appearance by Jacki Rust, Respondent/Plaintiff

Ms. Smith advises the Court that she is represented by counsel who is not able to appear in person due to a family emergency and whose Internet connection is poor and not able to connect to Zoom at this time. In the absence of Respondent/Plaintiff, the Court will continue the matter to April 6, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 624 at which time the Court will require in-person appearances.

Judge: Hon. Sharon Reardon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D624)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
